---
title: "Mary Hendrickson"
image: media/EEG_Picture.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
---

Hello! My name is Mary and I'm a senior majoring in psychology and concentrating in statistics & data science and race & ethnic studies at St. Olaf College. This quarto website is for my Data Science 2 project!

![Michelangelo's David](media/David.jpeg)

I saw the David when I went to Italy during a J term abroad! He is very large

![My cat Bernie](media/Bernie.jpeg)


This is my cat Bernie! He is also quite large
